title: No results with FILTER EXIST + multiple OPTIONAL
description:
The following query unexpectedly returns an empty result set on the http://dbpedia.org/sparql endpoint (Virtuoso 7.20).
prefix dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

select ?a ?i where {

    ?a a dbo:Automobile .

    filter exists { ?a dbo:manufacturer ?m }

    optional { ?a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/thumbnail> ?i } # matching
    optional { ?a <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/depiction> ?i } # matching
    optional { ?a <http://schema.org/image> ?i } # non-matching
    optional { ?a <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/logo> ?i } # non-matching

} limit 10

The OPTIONAL clauses implement the standard  property fallback pattern in order to retrieve a property from multiple non-exclusive predicates with a priority order, but in this case it works as expected only if either:

all patterns match (only optionals 1/2)
no pattern matches (only optionals 3/4)
at most on pattern matches and one pattern doesn't match (e.g. only optionals 2/3)

Almost certainly related to #393.
Possibly related also to #391.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE automobiles (id INT PRIMARY KEY, manufacturer VARCHAR, thumbnail VARCHAR, depiction VARCHAR, image VARCHAR, logo VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO automobiles (id, manufacturer, thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) VALUES (1, 'Toyota', 'toyota_thumbnail.jpg', 'toyota_depiction.jpg', NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO automobiles (id, manufacturer, thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) VALUES (2, 'Ford', 'ford_thumbnail.jpg', 'ford_depiction.jpg', NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, COALESCE(thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) AS image_url FROM automobiles WHERE manufacturer IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS optional_count FROM automobiles GROUP BY id HAVING optional_count > 0;
key_bug_features: FILTER EXIST with multiple OPTIONAL clauses returns empty results
